title: OBA-120 Belokiss FUCK Jinguji Kaoruko who is not too vulgar of a mature woman - Kaoruko Jinguji

Kaoruko was inspired there! Takeshi's friend will "spit" from now on and encourage him to get married a few years later. Kaoruko immediately steals Takeshi's eyes and kisses Takeshi's friend with a long stretched tongue.
